creator: wjenkner@inode.at
text:
But is 1.6.x the right version to update to ?

According to https://www.stackage.org/package/stack/snapshots stack-1.5.1 is
the most recent version which is (in some sense) supported with ghc 8.0.2.

This works for me:

stack --system-ghc --resolver lts-9.21 new foo
